parameters.content:
## Weekly Sales Call Intelligence — Fireflies + GPT-4o-mini + Sheets + Slack

For sales managers and revenue teams who want automatic AI analysis of every sales call transcript every Monday morning. The workflow connects to your Fireflies account, fetches all transcripts from the past 7 days, and for each call uses GPT-4o-mini to extract six intelligence fields: pricing mentions, objections, buying signals, competitor mentions, key takeaway, and a recommended next action. Every call is logged as one row in Google Sheets. Slack receives a weekly aggregated report covering all calls, top objections, top buying signals, and competitor mentions.

## How it works
- **1. Schedule — Every Monday 9AM** triggers the workflow each week
- **2. Set — Config Values** stores Fireflies API key, Sheet ID, Slack channel, and keywords
- **3. HTTP — Fetch Recent Transcripts** pulls the 50 most recent transcripts from Fireflies
- **4. Code — Filter Last 7 Days** filters to the past 7 days and outputs one item per transcript
- **5. IF — Any Transcripts Found?** stops cleanly if no calls were recorded this week
- **7. HTTP — Fetch Full Transcript** fetches complete transcript details for each call
- **8. Code — Extract Transcript Data** extracts sentences, sentiment, keywords, and action items
- **9. AI Agent — Analyze Sales Call** uses GPT-4o-mini to produce 6 structured intelligence fields
- **12. Code — Combine Analysis Results** merges AI output with transcript metadata
- **13. Google Sheets — Log Call Analysis** appends one row per call to the tracker sheet
- **14. Code — Build Weekly Slack Summary** aggregates all calls into one weekly digest
- **15. Slack — Send Weekly Report** delivers the weekly intelligence report to your channel

## Set up steps
1. In **2. Set — Config Values** — replace YOUR_FIREFLIES_API_KEY, YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID, sheet tab name, Slack channel, company name, and sales keywords
2. In **10. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **13. Google Sheets — Log Call Analysis** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential
4. In **15. Slack — Send Weekly Report** — connect your Slack OAuth2 credential
5. Create a Google Sheet tab named Sales Call Analysis with columns: Call Date, Meeting Title, Duration (min), Participants, Overall Sentiment, Pricing Mentions, Objections, Buying Signals, Competitor Mentions, Key Takeaway, Recommended Action, Transcript URL, Logged At
6. Activate the workflow — it runs every Monday at 9AM automatically

## Schedule and Config
Workflow triggers every Monday at 9AM. Config stores Fireflies API key, Sheet ID, Slack channel, company name, sales filter keywords, and the 7-day date window used throughout.

nodes.name: Section — Transcript Fetch, Filter, and Gate

parameters.content:
## Transcript Fetch, Filter, and Gate
Fetches the 50 most recent Fireflies transcripts then filters to the past 7 days. Outputs one item per transcript. The IF node checks if any calls exist — no calls this week exits cleanly via the Set node below.

nodes.name: Section — Full Transcript Fetch and AI Analysis

parameters.content:
## Full Transcript Fetch and AI Analysis
For each transcript, fetches complete details including sentences, ai_filters (pricing, questions, tasks), summary, and sentiment analytics. GPT-4o-mini produces 6 structured intelligence fields per call via Structured Output Parser.

## Results Assembly and Output
Merges AI output with metadata. Google Sheets logs one row per call. Code node aggregates all calls into a weekly digest covering objections, buying signals, and competitors. Slack delivers the report.

## ⚠️ Edit This Node Before Activating
Replace all six values: Fireflies API key (from fireflies.ai Settings then Integrations), Google Sheet ID, sheet tab name, Slack channel, company name, and comma-separated sales keywords used to identify relevant calls.

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: =No sales calls found this week. Nothing to analyze.

parameters.jsCode:
// Combine AI analysis output with transcript metadata
const aiOutput = $input.first().json.output;
const transcriptData = $('8. Code — Extract Transcript Data').item.json;

return [{
  json: {
    callDate: transcriptData.transcriptDate,
    callTitle: transcriptData.transcriptTitle,
    durationMinutes: transcriptData.durationMinutes,
    participants: transcriptData.participants,
    overallSentiment: transcriptData.overallSentiment,
    transcriptUrl: transcriptData.transcriptUrl,
    pricingMentions: aiOutput.pricingMentions || 'No pricing discussed',
    objections: aiOutput.objections || 'No objections detected',
    buyingSignals: aiOutput.buyingSignals || 'No buying signals detected',
    competitorMentions: aiOutput.competitorMentions || 'No competitors mentioned',
    keyTakeaway: aiOutput.keyTakeaway || 'No takeaway generated',
    recommendedAction: aiOutput.recommendedAction || 'No action recommended',
    sheetId: transcriptData.sheetId,
    sheetName: transcriptData.sheetName,
    slackChannel: transcriptData.slackChannel,
    companyName: transcriptData.companyName,
    weekStart: transcriptData.weekStart,
    weekEnd: transcriptData.weekEnd,
    totalCallsThisWeek: transcriptData.totalCallsThisWeek,
    loggedAt: new Date().toISOString().replace('T', ' ').substring(0, 16)
  }
}];
